recommended_modes.label: ARRIRAW / LogC3
recommended_modes.wb_notes: Preserve highlights; exposure bias +0.5 to +1.0 for skin density.
recommended_modes.highlight_limit_guidance: Soft roll-off starts early. Don't clip sensor.

recommended_modes.label: XAVC-S-I / S-Log3
recommended_modes.wb_notes: Dual native ISO. Use 12800 for clean shadows in low light.
recommended_modes.highlight_limit_guidance: S-Log3 needs +1 to +2 stops exposure to avoid noise.

known_pitfalls: Base ISO 12800 is extremely clean but watch for clipping.
